title: Passion Agent
description: 24/7 autonomous AI code improvement system. Analyzes repos, spawns Claude Code for fixes, submits PRs, and learns from merge/reject patterns.

title: BetMetrics.ca
description: Sports betting odds comparison platform with live data from 11 sportsbooks, forum, and user accounts. Built for affiliate marketing at scale.

title: LetsTrade
description: Real-time options trading scanner and dashboard with autonomous paper trading, market regime detection, and earnings analysis. 190K+ lines, runs 24/7.

title: LockedIn
description: One-tap connection card with action routing — follow all socials, download vCard, DM, book, or pay in a single tap. Built live at a Claude Code meetup.

title: Aerial Sentinel
description: Commercial drone-as-a-service surveillance platform with autonomous patrol, AI object detection, and client dashboard. Targeting the unserved Canadian mid-market.

title: Privacy Shield
description: Unified defensive OSINT tool combining digital footprint aggregation, facial recognition search, and automated data broker removal.

title: SyrenEffect
description: Official website for Twitch streamer SyrenEffect. Embedded clips, collab showcase, link analytics, and admin panel.

title: MustHaveFrenchies

title: Passion Pop
description: Match-and-pop bubble game with combos, power-ups, daily challenges, and achievement system. PWA-ready mobile-first design.

title: Vibe Coder
description: Vampire survivors-style idle game powered by coding. 18 enemy types, 4 bosses, 26 weapons, and Claude Code integration.

title: FCPXML MCP Server
description: AI-powered MCP server for Final Cut Pro XML editing. Automate timeline manipulation with natural language.

title: Fandom Wiki Bot
description: AI-assisted Fandom wiki bot with approval workflows. Automate edits while keeping human oversight.

title: Viral Clone
description: Telegram bot that clones viral TikTok content and auto-publishes across platforms. AI-powered content curation with queue management.
